description: AA-03.1 queueing/network-calculus digital twin for runtime hot paths.

queue_stages.name: Scheduler Ready Queue
queue_stages.description: FIFO/LIFO queue from spawn to first poll. Modeled as G/G/k with k = worker_count.

queue_stages.name: Cancel Lane Drain
queue_stages.description: Bounded drain of cancelled tasks interleaved with ready queue. Streak-limited.

queue_stages.name: Finalize Lane
queue_stages.description: Post-completion cleanup for tasks. Modeled as M/D/1 (deterministic service, Poisson arrival).

queue_stages.name: Obligation Settlement
queue_stages.description: Obligation commit/leak-check path. Modeled as batch service.

queue_stages.name: I/O Reactor Dispatch
queue_stages.description: Epoll/io_uring event dispatch. Modeled as G/G/1 with arrival from pending registrations.

queue_stages.name: Admission Control Gate
queue_stages.description: Root region task limit enforcement. Arrival rejected when at capacity.

queue_stages.name: Retry Backoff Queue
queue_stages.description: Exponential backoff queue for retriable operations. Modeled as G/G/1 with time-varying service.

queue_stages.name: Work-Stealing Path
queue_stages.description: Cross-worker task migration via steal. Modeled as periodic batch with power-of-two choices.

service_curve_types.description: beta(t) = R * max(0, t - T). Rate R, latency T.
alpha(t) = min(P*t, B + r*t). Peak P, burst B, sustained r.
alpha(t) = r*t + b. Rate r, burst b.
Periodic batch service with batch size B and period P.

error_budget.description: Disclosed approximation error bounds for twin predictions vs observed.

metrics.description: Median prediction error for queue delay

snapshot_field_mapping.description: Maps RuntimeKernelSnapshot fields to twin stage parameters.

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate queue stage catalog and service curve types
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa031 cargo test --test digital_twin_contract stage -- --nocapture
rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa031 cargo test --test digital_twin_contract mapping -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate error budget and prediction comparator
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa031 cargo test --test digital_twin_contract error -- --nocapture
